item.title: My 5 biggest takeaways after using the Motorola Razr Ultra 2025 for a year
item.itunes:title: My 5 biggest takeaways after using the Motorola Razr Ultra 2025 for a year
item.itunes:author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.itunes:summary: It's been nearly a year since the launch of the Razr Ultra 2025, so I'm taking a look back at my experience with the phone and my biggest takeaways from the last 12 months.
item.description: It's been nearly a year since the launch of the Razr Ultra 2025, so I'm taking a look back at my experience with the phone and my biggest takeaways from the last 12 months.
item.content:encoded: It's been nearly a year since the launch of the Razr Ultra 2025, so I'm taking a look back at my experience with the phone and my biggest takeaways from the last 12 months.

item.title: Someone got a hold of the LG Rollable to show us all how it works, and it makes me wish LG were still around. But would you buy it?
item.itunes:title: Someone got a hold of the LG Rollable to show us all how it works, and it makes me wish LG were still around. But would you buy it?
item.itunes:author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.itunes:summary: Zack Nelson of JerryRigEverything got his hands on an LG Rollable and took it apart to reveal its inner workings.
item.description: Zack Nelson of JerryRigEverything got his hands on an LG Rollable and took it apart to reveal its inner workings.
item.content:encoded: Zack Nelson of JerryRigEverything got his hands on an LG Rollable and took it apart to reveal its inner workings.

item.title: If you've got a CMF Watch, the Nothing X app is taking over: this is what you need to know

item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: CMF Watch users say goodbye to one app and hello to the Nothing X app, as the company urges users to begin transferring data.
item.description: CMF Watch users say goodbye to one app and hello to the Nothing X app, as the company urges users to begin transferring data.
item.content:encoded: CMF Watch users say goodbye to one app and hello to the Nothing X app, as the company urges users to begin transferring data.

item.title: Netflix ordered to pay back millions of subscribers in landmark ruling

item.content:encoded: Netflix’s price hikes just backfired in Italy, with a court ruling opening the door to refunds of up to €500.

item.content:encoded: Google Pay's Tap to Pay feature lets you add your debit and credit cards issued in India, and it makes paying at retail stores that much more convenient.

item.description: It's rare to score a deal on a new phone — but don't tell Amazon that, because this Galaxy S26 Ultra deal with a free $200 gift card is can't-miss stuff.
item.content:encoded: It's rare to score a deal on a new phone — but don't tell Amazon that, because this Galaxy S26 Ultra deal with a free $200 gift card is can't-miss stuff.

item.title: Xiaomi refreshes its streaming dongle with Google TV, but skips 4K again
item.itunes:title: Xiaomi refreshes its streaming dongle with Google TV, but skips 4K again
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: This faster Google TV stick makes old HD TVs smart again, but 1GB RAM and microUSB in 2026? Come on.
item.description: This faster Google TV stick makes old HD TVs smart again, but 1GB RAM and microUSB in 2026? Come on.
item.content:encoded: This faster Google TV stick makes old HD TVs smart again, but 1GB RAM and microUSB in 2026? Come on.

item.title: The Amazon Big Spring Sale is nearing an end, but you can still score 23% off the Echo Show 11 today
item.itunes:title: The Amazon Big Spring Sale is nearing an end, but you can still score 23% off the Echo Show 11 today
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: The Amazon Echo Show 11 has a large display and a range of features.
item.description: The Amazon Echo Show 11 has a large display and a range of features.
item.content:encoded: The Amazon Echo Show 11 has a large display and a range of features.

item.title: Edifier made a Bose-rivaling Bluetooth speaker, and it finally gets a discount
item.itunes:title: Edifier made a Bose-rivaling Bluetooth speaker, and it finally gets a discount
item.itunes:author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.itunes:summary: Edifier's ES300 has to be one of the best-looking Bluetooth speakers around, and the sound quality is just as good as my Bose SoundLink Max.
item.description: Edifier's ES300 has to be one of the best-looking Bluetooth speakers around, and the sound quality is just as good as my Bose SoundLink Max.
item.content:encoded: Edifier's ES300 has to be one of the best-looking Bluetooth speakers around, and the sound quality is just as good as my Bose SoundLink Max.

item.title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale launches 49% OFF this Insignia Fire TV — ends tonight!
item.itunes:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale launches 49% OFF this Insignia Fire TV — ends tonight!
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: A straightforward, plug-and-play Fire TV with an Alexa voice remote.
item.description: A straightforward, plug-and-play Fire TV with an Alexa voice remote.
item.content:encoded: A straightforward, plug-and-play Fire TV with an Alexa voice remote.
